description: Hybrid input schema for policy-based review of GDPR cross-border transfers. Technical metadata, structured business answers, and derived transfer facts are merged before qualitative evaluation.

current_region.description: Current AWS region where the dataset is stored or processed.

encryption_at_rest.description: Whether encryption at rest is enabled for the target dataset or resource.

contains_sensitive_data.description: Whether the dataset appears to contain special category or similarly sensitive personal data.

uses_processor.description: Whether an external processor or hosted service provider is involved in the transfer path.

access_control_in_place.description: Whether baseline access control appears to be configured.

dataset_name.description: Human-readable name of the dataset being evaluated.

scenario_notes.description: Optional free-form notes for the reviewer or demo presenter.
scenario_notes.example: US analytics processor receives EU customer event data.

data_subject_region.description: Region of the data subjects relevant to the assessment.

processing_purpose_defined.description: Whether the purpose of processing is clearly defined and documented.

data_minimized.description: Whether only necessary personal data is processed for the stated purpose.

retention_period_defined.description: Whether retention or deletion period is documented.

special_category_condition_met.description: Whether an Article 9 condition has been confirmed for special category data.

target_region.description: AWS region selected as target for storage or transfer.

controller_processor_roles_defined.description: Whether controller and processor responsibilities are clearly assigned.

dpa_in_place.description: Whether a Data Processing Agreement exists with the processor.

processor_sufficient_guarantees.description: Whether the processor provides sufficient guarantees under Article 28.

subprocessor_controls_in_place.description: Whether subprocessor approval, onward transfer, and re-delegation controls are documented.

scc_in_place.description: Whether Standard Contractual Clauses are in place.

bcr_in_place.description: Whether Binding Corporate Rules are in place.

other_safeguards_in_place.description: Whether another Article 46 safeguard is documented.

transfer_impact_assessment_completed.description: Whether a transfer impact assessment or equivalent third-country review was completed.

supplemental_measures_documented.description: Whether supplemental technical, contractual, or organizational measures are documented where relevant.

dpia_required.description: Whether the scenario indicates a Data Protection Impact Assessment requirement.

dpia_completed.description: Whether a required DPIA was completed and retained.

dpo_required.description: Whether the controller is likely required to appoint a Data Protection Officer for this scenario.

dpo_assigned.description: Whether the required Data Protection Officer or equivalent responsible person has been assigned.

incident_response_in_place.description: Whether a documented incident response process exists.

breach_notification_ready_72h.description: Whether 72-hour supervisory notification readiness is documented where a reportable breach could occur.

derogation_used.description: Whether the transfer relies on an Article 49 derogation.

derogation_type.description: Specific derogation type if Article 49 is used.

privacy_notice_updated.description: Whether privacy notice wording has been updated for the current processing or transfer context.

transfer_disclosed_to_subject.description: Whether the relevant transfer context was disclosed to the data subject.

records_of_processing_exists.description: Whether records of processing activities exist.

transfer_documented_in_ropa.description: Whether the transfer path and safeguards are documented in the record of processing activities.

data_subject_rights_process_ready.description: Whether access, correction, deletion, portability, and objection handling workflows are documented.

privacy_by_design_review_completed.description: Whether privacy by design/default review was completed for the processing or transfer design.

target_country_known.description: Whether target_region could be mapped to a country code.

adequacy_decision_exists.description: Whether the target country currently has an EU adequacy decision or is within the EU/EEA area.

transfer_safeguards_available.description: Whether SCCs, BCRs, or another Article 46 safeguard is present.

baseline_security_controls_ready.description: Whether encryption at rest, encryption in transit, and access control are all confirmed.
